CREATE TABLE list_table (int_list INTEGER[], varchar_list VARCHAR[]);
CREATE TABLE tbl (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, lst INTEGER[], comment VARCHAR);
UPDATE tbl SET lst = [90, 100] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, lst FROM tbl WHERE lst < [99];
SELECT list_value(SELECT lst FROM tbl WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TABLE nested_list_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, nested_lst LIST<INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO nested_list_table VALUES (1, list_value([1, 2, 3])), (2, list_value([4, 5]));
SELECT id FROM nested_list_table WHERE nested_lst[1] > 2;
SELECT * FROM list_table WHERE varchar_list LIKE '%a%';
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, mixed_list LIST<VARCHAR>);
INSERT INTO complex_table VALUES (1, list_value(['cat', 'dog', 'mouse'])), (2, list_value(['bird', NULL, 'fish']));
SELECT id, list_extract(mixed_list, 3) FROM complex_table WHERE mixed_list IS NOT NULL;
